title: The Souls of Black Folk
author: W.E.B. Du Bois
content: “It is a peculiar sensation, this double-consciousness, this sense of always looking at one's self through the eyes of others.”

title: The Second Sex
author: Simone de Beauvoir
content: “One is not born, but rather becomes, a woman.”

title: The Age of Reason
author: Thomas Paine
content: “My own mind is my own church.”

title: The Hero with a Thousand Faces
author: Joseph Campbell
content: “The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.”
